Pressing Chancellor on long-overdue Moor Farm roundabout investment

February 12, 2026
Civil Service Pension SchemeEmployment & TrainingPublic InterestUncategorized

Civil Service Pension Scheme

February 12, 2026
MP for Cramlington and Killingworth

Being elected as the first Labour and Co-operative Member of Parliament for the new Cramlington and Killingworth constituency was a huge honour. I am so grateful for the trust you have put in me as your elected representative, and I will work tirelessly to deliver for our communities, our region and country here and in Parliament.

My StoryMy WorkOur Area

My Priorities

Tackle the Cost of Living

For too long people have seen their cost of living squeezed. I’m working to enhance working rights in Parliament and to deliver investment into an economy that supports working people, creates good jobs, and supports the development of the clean and green economy.

Repair the NHS

The NHS was left in a dire state by the previous Conservative government. I know how it important it is to be able access timely and appropriate treatment, or to see the GP or dentist. I am supporting the Labour government’s mission to build an NHS fit for the future

Local Transport

Transport is vital for people to get to work, to see family and friends, to access education and training and to support the local economy. I’m working with our North East Mayor locally, and the Labour government nationally to secure a transport system that is more reliable, is greener and meets the needs of our communities.

Safer Communities

People should feel safe and secure in the local area, on our high street and in their communities. I’m working to secure more neighbourhood policing and to tackle anti-social behaviour and illegal bikes that blight our communities to ensure that we have safer streets.

Your Champion

I was born, raised, and live in our community. What matters to people here matters to me too and I want to be our champion in Parliament, raising the issues that are important locally. I have a local office and team to help support residents, I hold regular surgeries across the constituency, and I attend events with local schools, community group and residents’ organisations.

10,891

Cases Actioned

256

Constituency Visits

145
